meta.title: Accommodation | Villa Mandara
meta.description: The whole villa for your group or a single room — six rooms named after the hours of the day, with in-season and off-season rates.

hero.title: The rooms of Mandara
hero.lead: Six rooms named after the hours of the day, and one shared villa in complete privacy. Take the whole space for your group, or just your own room.

villa.title: The whole villa
villa.note: 6 bedrooms · up to 9 guests · the entire space to yourselves

room.title: A single room
room.note: Common areas and bathrooms are shared with other guests

villa.title: The whole villa — just for you
villa.lead: Rent the entire villa and have it all to yourself — the six rooms, the shared living room, the kitchen, the pool and the garden, in complete calm and privacy for your group.
villa.exclusivity: The whole villa just for your group — complete privacy, with no shared spaces.

includes.garden: Garden and terraces with a view

rooms.title: Or just your room
rooms.lead: Booking a single room is possible. The common areas and bathrooms are shared — so rooms are combined with other guests of the villa.
rooms.sharedNote: Bathrooms and common areas are shared when booking a single room.

features: A cosy corner for morning coffee
Tall windows and plenty of light
Bed for two and a deep armchair
View of the sunset over the mountain
Scented candles for a long sleep
